trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 report lists Frollini and Carrefour Bio as recommended biscotti, indicating they are among the top choices in their tests.
